---
name: netbeans-dialog
description: "How to create a new NetBeans-compatible dialog in TwelveLittleScoutsClerk. Use when asked to: add a new dialog, create a new feature dialog, generate a list view, add a DB-backed table dialog, add a menu entry in the Daten menu, create a billing template dialog, create a CRUD screen. Covers DBStrukt bindtype, BaseDialog list dialog, BaseDialogDialog edit subdialog, paired .form XML, and MainWin menu wiring."
argument-hint: "Feature name (e.g. BillingTemplate)"
---

# Creating a NetBeans-compatible Dialog in TwelveLittleScoutsClerk

Every feature consists of:

1. A **DB bindtype** (`DBFoo extends DBStrukt`) in `bindtypes/`
2. A **list dialog** (`Foo extends BaseDialog`) + paired `Foo.form`
3. An **edit subdialog** (`EditFoo extends BaseDialogDialog`) + paired `EditFoo.form`
4. Optionally a **create dialog** (`CreateFoo extends BaseDialogDialog`) + paired `CreateFoo.form`
5. **Menu wiring** in both `MainWin.java` and `MainWin.form`

Reference files with exact code templates: [patterns.md](./references/patterns.md)

---

## Step 1 — DB Bindtype

**File:** `src/at/redeye/twelvelittlescoutsclerk/bindtypes/DBFoo.java`

- Extend `DBStrukt`
- Declare `public static final String FOO_IDX_SEQUENCE = "FOO_IDX_SEQUENCE";`
- Fields: always include `DBInteger idx`, `DBHistory hist`, then domain fields
- Available field types: `DBString(name, title, maxLen)`, `DBInteger`, `DBDateTime`, `DBFlagInteger`, `DBBlob`, `DBDouble`
- Constructor: `super("FOO")` (UPPERCASE table name), then `add(...)` every field
- Mark primary key: `idx.setAsPrimaryKey()`
- Call `setVersion(1)`
- Override `getNewOne()` returning `new DBFoo()`
- Add copyright `@author` header matching existing files
- Mark class as **generated by AI (Claude Sonnet 4.6)**

See [DBStrukt template](./references/patterns.md#dbstrukt-bindtype).

---

## Step 2 — List Dialog Java

**File:** `src/at/redeye/twelvelittlescoutsclerk/dialog_foo/Foo.java`  
**Package:** `at.redeye.twelvelittlescoutsclerk.dialog_foo`

- Extend `BaseDialog` (add `NewSequenceValueInterface` if rows are created here)
- Constructor `Foo(MainWin mainwin)`:
  - `super(mainwin.getRoot(), "Title")`
  - `initComponents()`
  - Create `DBFoo` + `TableManipulator(root, jTContent, fooInstance)`
  - Call `tm.hide(...)` on all internal fields: all `hist.*`, `bp_idx`, `idx` (unless you want idx visible)
  - Call `tm.setValidator(...)` for date fields
  - `tm.prepareTable()`
  - `feed_table(false)`
  - `tableFilter1.setFilter(jTContent)`
  - Disable Save/New/Delete buttons when `mainwin.isAzLocked()`
- Implement `feed_table(boolean autombox)` using `new AutoMBox(...)`
- Implement `save()` using `DefaultInsertOrUpdater.insertOrUpdateValuesWithPrimKey`
- Button handlers use `//GEN-FIRST:event_X` / `//GEN-LAST:event_X` markers
- `jBEditActionPerformed`: check selection → create `EditFoo` → `registerOnCloseListener` that saves and refreshes → `invokeDialogUnique(editFoo)`
- `jBNewActionPerformed`: wrap in `AutoMBox`, call `newEntry()`
- `jBDelActionPerformed`: delete via DB, remove from list and table
- `jBSaveActionPerformed`: `save()` then `close()`
- Override `canClose()` calling `checkSave(tm)`
- Keep the variables block: `// Variables declaration - do not modify//GEN-BEGIN:variables` … `// End of variables declaration//GEN-END:variables`
- Mark class as **generated by AI (Claude Sonnet 4.6)**

See [List Dialog Java template](./references/patterns.md#list-dialog-java).

---

## Step 3 — List Dialog .form

**File:** `src/at/redeye/twelvelittlescoutsclerk/dialog_foo/Foo.form`

- Top-level type: `org.netbeans.modules.form.forminfo.JFrameFormInfo`
- `defaultCloseOperation` property value = `0`
- Required AuxValues (copy exactly from `Member.form`)
- Components:
  - `jScrollPane1` wrapping `jTContent` (JTable) with `mouseClicked` → `jTContentMouseClicked`
  - `jPanel1` containing buttons: `jBSave`, `jBNew`, `jBEdit`, `jBDel`, `jBClose` (same icons as Member)
  - `tableFilter1` of class `at.redeye.twelvelittlescoutsclerk.tableFilter`
  - `jLabel1` (title text, font `Dialog Bold 18`)
  - `jLInfo` (status label, single space text)
- GroupLayout structure matches `Member.form` exactly

See [List .form template](./references/patterns.md#list-form).

---

## Step 4 — Edit Subdialog Java

**File:** `src/at/redeye/twelvelittlescoutsclerk/dialog_foo/EditFoo.java`  
**Package:** `at.redeye.twelvelittlescoutsclerk.dialog_foo`

- Extend `BaseDialogDialog`
- Constructor `EditFoo(MainWin mainwin, DBFoo entity)`:
  - `super(mainwin.root, "Title")`
  - `initComponents()`
  - `bindVar(jTextField, entity.field)` for each editable field
  - For `JTextField` + `DBString` also set `field.setDocument(new DocumentFieldLimit(var.getMaxLen()))`
  - `var_to_gui()`
  - Disable `jBSave` if `mainwin.isAzLocked()`
- Implement `check()` for validation (empty checks, uniqueness)
- `jBSaveActionPerformed`: call `check()`, persist via `DefaultInsertOrUpdater`, `getTransaction().commit()`, set `saved = true`, call `close()`
- Expose `public boolean pressedSave()` returning the `saved` flag
- Mark class as **generated by AI (Claude Sonnet 4.6)**

See [Edit Dialog Java template](./references/patterns.md#edit-dialog-java).

---

## Step 5 — Edit Subdialog .form

**File:** `src/at/redeye/twelvelittlescoutsclerk/dialog_foo/EditFoo.form`

- Top-level type: `org.netbeans.modules.form.forminfo.JDialogFormInfo`
- `defaultCloseOperation` = `0`, set `minimumSize` (e.g. `[548, 360]`)
- Components: one `jLabel` + `jTextField` pair per editable attribute, bottom `jPanel1` with `jBSave` and `jBClose` buttons
- Use same icon paths as `EditMember.form`: `button_ok.gif` for Save, `fileclose.gif` for Close

See [Edit .form template](./references/patterns.md#edit-form).

---

## Step 6 — Wire MainWin.java

Three locations must be edited. **Do not disturb GEN markers.**

### 6a. Variable declaration (inside GEN-BEGIN:initComponents block, top)
```java
jMenuItemFoo = new javax.swing.JMenuItem();
```

### 6b. Menu assembly (inside GEN-BEGIN:initComponents block, after `jMenu5.add(jMenuItemEvents);`)
```java
jMenuItemFoo.setText("Foo Title");
jMenuItemFoo.addActionListener(new java.awt.event.ActionListener() {
    public void actionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {
        jMenuItemFooActionPerformed(evt);
    }
});
jMenu5.add(jMenuItemFoo);
```

### 6c. Action handler (after GEN-END:initComponents)
```java
private void jMenuItemFooActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {//GEN-FIRST:event_jMenuItemFooActionPerformed
    if( checkAz() )
        invokeDialogUnique(new Foo(this));
}//GEN-LAST:event_jMenuItemFooActionPerformed
```

### 6d. Variable (inside GEN-BEGIN:variables block)
```java
private javax.swing.JMenuItem jMenuItemFoo;
```

### 6e. Import (at top of file)
```java
import at.redeye.twelvelittlescoutsclerk.dialog_foo.Foo;
```

---

## Step 7 — Wire MainWin.form

Inside `<Menu class="javax.swing.JMenu" name="jMenu5">`, after the last `<MenuItem>`:

```xml
<MenuItem class="javax.swing.JMenuItem" name="jMenuItemFoo">
  <Properties>
    <Property name="text" type="java.lang.String" value="Foo Title"/>
  </Properties>
  <Events>
    <EventHandler event="actionPerformed" listener="java.awt.event.ActionListener" parameters="java.awt.event.ActionEvent" handler="jMenuItemFooActionPerformed"/>
  </Events>
</MenuItem>
```

---

## Critical Rules

| Rule | Detail |
|------|--------|
| **Never destroy GEN markers** | `//GEN-BEGIN:initComponents` … `//GEN-END:initComponents`, `//GEN-FIRST:event_X` … `//GEN-LAST:event_X`, `//GEN-BEGIN:variables` … `//GEN-END:variables` are managed by NetBeans — preserve them exactly |
| **Paired .form + .java** | Every dialog class must have a same-name `.form` file in the same directory |
| **Package = directory** | `dialog_foo/Foo.java` → `package at.redeye.twelvelittlescoutsclerk.dialog_foo;` |
| **"Generated by AI"** | Every generated class gets `// generated by AI (Claude Sonnet 4.6)` comment |
| **Both MainWin files** | Menu changes must be applied to BOTH `MainWin.java` AND `MainWin.form` |
| **AutoMBox for DB ops** | All database operations go inside `new AutoMBox(...)` for uniform error handling |
| **checkAz() guard** | Menu handlers for dialogs that need a billing period must call `if( checkAz() )` |
| **No data/ folder** | Never access the `data/` folder |
| **Maven build** | Build: `mvn compile` — Test: `mvn test` |
| **Python venv** | If any Python scripts are involved use `.venv` |
